reviews.title: Fancy property under indifferent management with no care for guests or property itself.
reviews.positives:
The good point of Emerald Bay hotel is the quirky luxury design by Bill Bensley, everything else is far from “the absolute jewel of luxury” as advertised by GM John Woolley at welcome brochure of the resort. 

Another good point I want to mention was guest relation supervisor May I had chance to talk. She was really passionate about her job and had great communication skills.
reviews.negatives:
At first it is very beautiful but uncomfortable check in area: you have to sign documents, talk with reception staff — to do these things siting on the pommel horse is not to my liking. From the beginning I realized that if you meet a staff member anywhere he/she doesn’t say “Hello” or greet you. That is completely opposite to Thai hotels.

I was escorted to the room by reception girl, immediately after I stepped in I saw the empty Pringles tube standing on the balcony table. Moreover there were 2 large yellow stains right on the duvet cover and long hairs in the bathroom. Just for your understanding they knew I travel for B-Day occasion and they even put tiny cake into the room. Just imagine the quality of housekeeping and room inspection if they haven’t notice Pringles tube standing right on the table, yellow stains on the duvet and long black hairs in the bathroom while putting the birthday cake inside the room.

The guest relation girl offered a free lunch excluding cocktails while waiting for the room, but forgot to explain details on billing to Red Rum restaurant staff. Ice cream was served in store packaging not in scoops — a plate and round pint of ice cream on it.

When the room was ready I stepped in and saw the bed was made wrong with smaller than needed topper making the bed trimmed down by edges. Again I had to call housekeeping to remake the bed.

Breakfast buffet is huge, but during early hours most of the live cooking stations are not manned — you have to find a staff first to order eggs Benedict or omelette. Some products are not possible to pick from the buffet, yogurts or sushi for example are in the fridges with no access by the guests. You have to find the staff and ask for it, a bit humiliating for me. I do not understand the reason behind. Then I asked a tea pot for 2 people they served me a pot with hot water and 2 cheap tea bags on the side — disappointing.

reviews.title: Late check inns
reviews.text: Stadf is very un supportive.  Cant help in early checkinns . Dont support on extra beds and dont consider jw marriot membership card. My first experience was good but when i send my parents their hospitality was pathetic.

reviews.title: Great theme, slow restaurant
reviews.positives: Unique, themed facilities were fun change even for young families. Plenty of talking points with your little kids wherever you visit around the complex. Beautiful beach that feels like the entire stretch is private. Don’t miss the sunrises.
reviews.negatives:
Restaurants were horribly slow to serve. We had dinner the casual Tempus Fugit restaurant twice and first time our last food item (burger) didn’t come for about an hour and second time it wasn’t even sent to kitchen until we asked. Food quality is good but be prepared to wait long for anything you ask. If you’re tired at the end of the day and want quick food for kids, best to visit nearby restaurants along the beach than the on-premise restaurants.  
Red Rum poolside restaurant was a bit better, and Chemistry Bar was excellent.

that one person's effort may not be enough to address the underlying issues. 

In conclusion, based on this experience, I do not plan to return to JW Marriott Phu Quoc.

reviews.title: Very clean, friendly staff, and a unique architectural concept. It’s very important to check the weather forecast before
reviews.positives: I liked that the hotel was very clean, beautiful, and had a unique university-inspired concept. The staff were friendly, and it was very convenient to have water and SPF sunscreen available at the beach. The breakfast was delicious, and the bar was great, with beautiful and tasty cocktails. A huge thank you to the staff for constantly cleaning the beach — I know it must have been incredibly difficult
reviews.negatives:
It wasn’t very convenient to contact the hotel by email or by phone, as calling required a local SIM card. I would have appreciated having WhatsApp available for ongoing support. I would also suggest extending the coffee shop opening hours until 8 PM, and providing not only SPF 50 but also SPF 30 at the beach. It would also be helpful to have drinking water available at the reception.

Unfortunately, we were unlucky with the weather in early January — it was very windy. I recommend checking the weather forecast before booking. Because of the strong wind, we couldn’t swim in the sea, and no water activities were available.

reviews.title: (Probably the only) True Gem in the Emerald Bay
reviews.positives: Exceptional facilities and epic design language. The hotel itself could be the reason to visit the island without any needs to step outside this wonderful dream. Been to several resorts all over the world but this one is so special - almost like an endless book to read if you are curious about the details and the on-campus treasure hunt. The staff are magical - Mr. Vihn (hope I have spelled it right way if not my apologies) during the night shift who welcomed us during the very late night check-in, Ms. Ellis the most helpful lady who guided us to our room and speacial Thanks to Mr. Hubert who showed true passion in both the hotel itself and the hospitality profession. The complimentary tickets of the Kiss of the Sea show give a perfect ending note to our short stay.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast time could be extended a little bit and the sea is a lot windy than expected.

reviews.title: If the room condition and hygiene are improved, it will be the best resort in Phu Quoc! The room renewal is urgent.
reviews.text:
I was contemplating where to go for this trip and after seeing pictures of the Marriott Resort, it was so beautiful that I chose Phu Quoc, so I had high expectations for the resort! To put it simply, the pool, breakfast, and service were perfect, but the room condition was a zero...ㅜㅜ

The room was too dark, had a musty smell, and was humid. The bedding was damp, the furniture showed a lot of wear, and the bathroom was so dirty that I couldn't take a bath.. The shower filter was the dirtiest among the resorts I stayed at in Phu Quoc. The price was similar to that of other 5-star hotels for 2-3 nights...

Because of the dirty and musty room condition, I couldn't stay in the room for long, so I mostly spent time outside and just slept there. Even my mom, who was with me, said she wanted to leave the room quickly; haha, so sad.. 

Other than the room condition, everything else was great.
The pool had a different vibe compared to other large resorts; it was nature-friendly and beautiful, and the ocean view from the pool was truly unforgettable...

The breakfast was the best! You could tell that they used good quality ingredients, making it stand out compared to other resorts. The coconut coffee offered at breakfast was the most delicious coffee I’ve had in Vietnam! The attentive service, with several staff regularly coming to check if everything tasted okay or if I had any discomfort, was very much what you'd expect from a luxury resort.

It reminded me of the Shilla Hotel in our country..? It may be old and worn, but it differentiates itself through the quality of food and service. However, while the Shilla Hotel has an old room condition, it's not dirty.. hahahaha

Looking at the room condition, I thought it had been around for over 20 years, but I was surprised to learn that it opened in 2017.. hahaha Why is hygiene management not being done...ㅜㅜ It seems that, as a luxury resort, they have hired many staff members, but please increase the number of staff for room management and focus on improving room condition and hygiene!
Above all, a room renovation is absolutely necessary. If the rooms are renovated, it’s a resort I would want to return to.

reviews.title: I am a bit disappointed with the quality and service.
reviews.text: I am a bit disappointed because the 5-star hotel uses cheap toilet paper that my house would never use. There is no airport shuttle service, and I feel that guests are not appreciated when they have to call a taxi to get to the resort. I have never stayed at a 5-star resort where I had to call a taxi to arrive and depart. I am very disappointed in this regard. The drinking water is provided by the hotel in glass bottles, which I feel is not safe because the bottles are not sealed like other bottled water and can be easily opened. The staff is friendly and polite. The food is not as varied as in other 5-star hotels I have stayed at. At checkout, I was not offered a glass of water; only at check-in was I welcomed with a very tasty hibiscus drink, but upon leaving, I was completely ignored. I have stayed at many other 5-star hotels in Vietnam and around the world, and I find this resort does not live up to the money I spent. The only thing I liked was the design of the buildings in the style of old European architecture; everything else I did not like because the quality does not meet 5-star standards. I will not recommend this place to my friends lest they be disappointed like I was.

reviews.title: A beautiful, luxurious, and relaxing stay with amazing service and unforgettable views
reviews.positives:
Absolutely wonderful stay. This is a truly high-class hotel with excellent value for money. The property is beautiful, elegant, and very well maintained, with perfect attention to detail throughout.

The staff were extremely friendly, professional, and welcoming, and everyone we interacted with spoke English very well, which made the stay very comfortable and easy.

Our room was beautiful, and the view from the balcony was absolutely divine. Everything felt thoughtful, relaxing, and luxurious. I would definitely recommend this hotel and would be happy to come back.

reviews.title: Not as good as expected
reviews.text:
Might be we were just unlucky as the wind was not in our favor. It caused a lot of rubbish landed on the resort's beach - "Bai Khem" which is considered as one of the best in the world. Furthermore both of the rooms had the smell of mold and we had to complain many times about our bathrooms. To be fair the beach's issue was out of their control but the room should not be like that as this is the highest rated hotel in Phu Quoc.

However when we checked-out the hotel did apologize and gave us a compensation - 5 stars hotel service. We will try again in different month later and hopefully the beach will be better. Not recommended after the first experience but will see in the future.

reviews.title: The service quality doesn't worth the money
reviews.text:
We stayed here during the weekends that there were 2 weddings consecutively. However, we weren't informed to expect that huge amount of guests; hence, the breakfast hall was so full and we have to wait for so long to get a table. If they could just drop us an inform letter in advance so we could prepare ourselves, there would be no / less disappointment.
Another night, around 8-9PM, we came to the restaurant for late dinner, it was empty at that hour obviously. We ordered foods and drinks, and waited long for the food to come. We expected to have some breads and drinks while waiting for main dishes - but nothing. The staffs brought EVERYTHING all AT ONCE: breads, drinks and main dishes. 5-star quality?
Room toiletries:  only 2 toilet paper rolls provided for our whole stay. No extra, no add-ons when they do the room everyday. Coffee wasn't fully re-filled too.
On check out, we asked for buggy to come at 12:15PM and no one came. At 12:30, we called & was told to wait for 15'.

reviews.positives: Exceptional property with stunning design, beautiful beach, and excellent service. A special thanks to Astrid, who was incredibly helpful and made our stay even more enjoyable.

reviews.title: Wedding ceremony in progress.
reviews.text: Since there was a wedding, it became noisy, and I was asked to show the letter when dining at the hotel's restaurant, which I handed to the staff when I placed my order, but I was not given any discount at all. Also, the entire hotel property was decorated with Indian themes, which made it difficult to take good photos. It was so different from the JW style that I didn’t feel any consideration for the guests. I believe this should be communicated at the time of booking, rather than on the day of the stay.

reviews.title: Disneyland
reviews.positives:
En arrivant à l'hôtel, nous ne nous attendions pas à découvrir un établissement d'une telle envergure. On se serait presque cru à Disneyland tant l'endroit est grandiose. Cependant, nous avons rapidement été séduits par le lieu. La plage est magnifique, et la piscine, bien que moins impressionnante que sur les photos, reste très agréable.
Je recommande cet hôtel à ceux qui recherchent beauté et tranquillité sur l'une des plus belles plages du Vietnam.
reviews.negatives:
Notre seul regret concerne le Pink Resto, qui se présente comme un restaurant gastronomique français. Pour un dîner à quatre sans vin, nous avons payé 700€, ce qui est exorbitant au Vietnam pour une cuisine plutôt moyenne.
Cependant, les autres sur place sont excellents et offrent des prix bien plus raisonnables.

reviews.title: A concept hotel designed for the Asian market
reviews.text:
In the words of the Deputy GM; this hotel was built for instagram. It's high on concept, but at the expense of longevity & has plumbing, mold & cracks to contend with already. Sadly the pools are in shadow by 3pm due to the position of the accommodation. The beach is beautiful but for us, too windy to use (a rare occurrence).  
Staff are charming and eager to please. They're still learning the art of 5 star service but are quick to remedy mistakes. 
Food is mixed. Breakfast delicious but the breakfast room is more akin with a crèche. Lunch can be slow but Red Rum & French & Co are good. Tempus fugit feels like a canteen as all large hotels struggle to achieve charm in their main dining area. The Chemistry lab is fun & a far nicer venue to eat in - but needs a bigger menu and its own kitchen. 
Room service was only 5/10 - nothing was replaced but once a call was made, things quickly rectified. 
All in all we were lucky to arrive in early days low occupancy & found corners to relax.

reviews.title: Fantastic Anniversay stay at JW Marriott Phu Quoc Resort
reviews.text: We stayed there 5 nights for our anniversary. I had high expectarions prior to my arrival, based on research, but the resort blew me away and exceeded all my expectations. The make-believe University of LaMarck concept was realized to such attention to detail that it was as real as real thing, and the architecture, facilities and all the paraphernalia that went with the concept were gorgeous. The private Kem beach was great, quiet, warm, convenient, and clean and invitint. All the pools and the restaurants werw great too, especially the Pink Pearl French Restaurant, an unforgettably beautiful place and top notcg French cuisine too. Most of all, though, it was the staff, al of whom were so kind, warm andand well prepared to help all the time that made the difference. We are especially grateful to our maitre d'heur Annie, who helped make our anniversay dinners so special.  All in all, a 5 star resort that made out trip dream-like. Highly recommended for couples!
reviews.response:
Dear Inhyok,

Thank you for sharing your wonderful feedback on your recent stay at our resort. We are thrilled to learn that your anniversary celebration exceeded all your expectations.

We are delighted that you were captivated by the "University of Lamarck" concept and appreciated the attention to detail throughout the resort. We are also pleased to hear that you enjoyed private Kem Beach, the various pools, and exceptional dining experience at  Pink Pearl Restaurant. Your kind word will inspire us to provide more memorable and fulfilling stay.

Once again, thank you for choosing JW Marriott Phu Quoc to celebrate your anniversary. We hope you will cherish the memories created during your stays.

Best regards,

Mahajan Ian

2. View, ambience and environment: nice private beach, beautiful gardens and excellent landscape, special the bay front view. 

3. Room decor: totally attractive by the University Theme. I was staying in Visualle Arts and love the Indochine style.

4. Facilities and conditions: room facility is more than satisfied with every necessary and detailed equipment like bluetooth bed table JBL clock and speakers. Lamps and lights everywhere. Water provided abundantly. The minus point was only the Ceiling lambs near the bed were hung too low so easily to knock your forehead.

- Swimming pool were all nice and amazing view with impressed decoration, also located just infront of the building. Minus points were: lack of service staff near by and the steps in the pool were in the black and same color with the bottom floor of the pool, so you could easily hurt your knee or feets.

- Spa: excellent with great decoration (mushroom learning faculty) and very warm welcome as well as serving staff. 

- Gym: very modern and state of the art gym machines. Clean and quiet.

4. Entertainment: provided lots of activities. I tried Kayak and Boarding and feel so excited. Minus point that I have booked in advance but when I enter the Entertainment Zone (near the Shell Pool), there were many E staffs there but one male staff with uniform refused to assist me with the activities. Fortunately, other male staff names Hoang Khang proceed to assist me with both activities and the thumbs up for him, while thumbs down for the others.

reviews.title: Overwhelming! Brilliant bartender, great cocktails
reviews.text:
The resort is marvelous with its incredible landscape, architecture and things that make great insta photos. Facilities are great but phone in room doesn't work, so we couldn't call the golf cart to pick us up when checkout. We were almost late for flight. Kinda unpleasant experience on our last day. 

The only best thing we had at the resort was the lovely female bartender - Phuong / Sunny at the Department of Chemistry bar. She is so lovely, friendly, honest. She knows exactly how to make a cocktail to our taste, and she is so fun to talk to. At first we just planned to have a drink and had no plan to eat dinner at the resort. Sunny was so lovely that we ended up spending the evening there with food and drinks. She is brilliant! Drinks are sooooo good too! Will definitely come back for her :))

reviews.title: Fantastique, un hôtel qui mérite ces 5 étoiles !
reviews.positives:
Cet établissement est incroyable, il possède une architecture folle, il y a toujours quelque chose à regarder, nos yeux sont partout ! 
3 piscines magnifiques pour tout les goûts, et une plage somptueuse de sable blanc et eau turquoise c’est magique, une carte postale ! Également des paddle / kayak mis à notre disposition sur la plage. 
Leur restaurant propose des plats européens et de plus excellent !! 
Notre chambre a été surclassé car nous avons attendu plus de temps que prévu, ce qui a été une agréable surprise avec une telle chambre, vue sur la mer, et immense on aurait dit un appartement. 
Une salle de bain avec deux vasques bien distincte c’est super pratique ! 
Une terrasse avec un sofa ! Quelle bonne idée c’est tellement agréable de s’y poser le soir ! 
Une salle de sport immense avec tous l’équipement nécessaire. 
Un petit déjeuner délicieux , il y en a pour tous les goûts, il est FOU. 
Ça a été notre plus bel hôtel à phu quoc et nous y reviendrons pour sur ! C’est un hôtel qui mérite ces 5 étoiles. 
Merci pour tout !!
reviews.negatives:
Petit bémol sur sunset town, certes nous y sommes aller gratuitement grâce a leur navette, mais lors des renseignements pour le spectacle « The kiss of The sea » la veille, la jeune fille nous avait informé que grâce à notre hôtel nous aurions les billets gratuits, mais lorsque nous sommes aller pour prendre les tickets, la fille a contacter notre hôtel et celui ci a affirmé qu’ils avaient arrêter l’offre gratuite la veille de notre venu.

reviews.title: Absolute wonderful experience with a wrinkle
reviews.text:
The hotel itself bypasses all expectations. A truly wonderful experience - room, facilities, service and location are 5 star ++.
Unfortunately, all is let down by F&B. Food is nothing short of a disaster. Over 6 nights we had one good dish because we persuaded the chef to prepare something different for us (they also did not charge...thanks). However, with the sole exception of breakfast the food was truly bad and on one occasion we ended up on the toilet for most of the night. Also, if you like Schweppes Tonic with your Gin, well, it may be on the menu but since the hotel signed an exclusive with Pepsi you can only have Everest Tonic - perfect if you like it sweet :-(
For a truly 5 star hotel.....hmm. c'mon JW, I know you can do better.
We are looking forward to going back...once the F&B gets sorted.

reviews.title: Paradiesisch reicht nicht, es war einfach unglaublich....
reviews.positives:
Das Resort ist eine andere Welt, es wurde im Kolonialstil ein französischer Campus nachempfunden und die Häuser und alle Bereiche in diesen Themen ausgebaut.
Die Zimmer sind riesig und die enorm hohen Decken und das große, luxuriöse Vollbad mit Regendusche ließ fast von einer kleinen Wohnung anmuten, obwohl wir nur STANDARD gebucht hatten.
Wir waren für fünfzehn Nächte dort und haben die malerische Bucht und den sensationellen Service des Resort genossen, man kann sagen es war außergewöhnlich.
Durch die Größe hatte man die anderen Gäste gar nicht gespürt, die Restaurationen waren Top, wir hatten NUR Frühstück gebucht und waren vom Angebot, es war ALLES inklusive und mehr als reichlich begeistert.
Rund um das Resort sind sehr viele kleine Gastronomie-Betriebe mit einem super Preis-Leistungsverhältnis, was am Ende noch dazu geführt hat, dass wir deutlich weniger ausgegeben haben, als wir geplant hatten.
Das Resort ist sehr gepflegt und achtet den ganzen Tag darauf, dass wirklich alles Biltz-Sauber und für jeden Gast alles perfekt parat steht, Adults und Familien mit Kindern kommen hier auf ihre Kosten, ohne das man sich gegenseitig stört, die Emerald-Bay Bucht ist wunderschön mit den Palmen und diesem so angenehmen Klima, lange Spaziergänge am Strand, auch am Abend sind möglich.
Alles ist sicher, bewacht und man hat nie das Gefühl von Gefahr.
Es gibt ein großes Gym, was 24/7 geöffnet ist, überall gibt es gekühltes Wasser und jeder Wunsch wird versucht zu erfüllen, ob am Beach oder an den großen Poolanlagen, so etwas hat man wirklich sehr, sehr selten.
reviews.negatives: Nicht gefallen hat uns, dass die Bevölkerung mit dem achtlos weggeworfenen Plastikmüll sich selbst zerstört und  dieses Juwel stark belastet, das Resort hat enormen Man- und Women-Power im Einsatz dem entgegenzuwirken, aber es bedrückt sehr, wenn man sieht wie Menschen so einen besonderen Ort mit diesem herrlichen Meer und dieser Bucht belasten, ohne es selbst zu merken, dass sie diese sensible Umgebung eher schützen und nachhaltig bewahren sollten.

Sincerely,

Duc Tran

JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa

reviews.title: Revenge on the honeymoon that couldn't happen due to COVID.
reviews.text: After COVID, we chose to go on our honeymoon abroad for the first time with our child! I thought the service and facilities matched the price, and once we got there, my husband and I kept saying, "Wow!" The hotel has four restaurants, and while there is a children's menu, it isn't suitable for a two-year-old. During our four-night stay, we got a bit bored; the food was delicious, but not cheap. If you're okay with eating outside at markets or local shops, I'd recommend that. There were almost no Japanese staff or anyone who could speak Japanese! We managed with some English and a translation device, but it was a bit of a hassle, and there were times I worried about whether we were communicating properly. However, on the day of our return flight, when I consulted about the time, they kindly allowed us to have a late check-out until 3 PM free of charge, providing the best service until the end!
reviews.response:
Dear YURIE,

Thank you for sharing your feedback on your recent stay at our resort. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your honeymoon trip and found the overall service and facilities to be up to your expectations. We are particularly pleased that you and your husband were impressed by the resort upon arrival.

We understand your observations regarding the dining options for your 2-year-old. We will carefully review your feedback and explore ways to enhance our children's menu offerings to better cater to the needs of young guests. We also acknowledge that the limited availability of Japanese-speaking staff may have presented some communication challenges. We are always striving to improve our multilingual capabilities and will consider implementing additional language support options for our guests.

We are glad that you were able to enjoy a late check-out on your departure day. We value your feedback and will use it to continuously improve our services and ensure a comfortable

reviews.positives:
朝食や他の飲食店もとてもよかったです。朝食で食べたヨーグルトは絶品でした。どこもホテルの宿泊者のみ入店可能なのでリラックスできて安心です。到着日に体調を崩していましたがチェックインの待ち時間に隣の静かな場所へ案内してくださったり生姜茶をだしてくださって助かりました。ホテル内のアクティビティも幾つもあり時間が足りませんでした。全体的に建築が素敵で散策しながら楽しめます。敷地の真ん中に子供用のサッカーフィールドがあり皆が遊んでました。狭すぎず広すぎずでちょうど良い面積だったので隅から隅まで歩いて見学できました。
Only guests at this hotel can enter all the restaurants and cafes, which is very chill and safe.
reviews.negatives: これはホテルの責任ではなく、フーコック全体の観光客か漁師の認識の甘さが原因だと思いますが、沖から海に捨てられたゴミが漂流してきます。環境やマナーなどを観光業と地元の人達とで真剣に考えた方がいいと感じました。ホテルの従業員の方が丁寧に拾っていましたが、フーコックの海の解決にはつながらないと思います。１０年以上前に訪れていますが、あきらかに海が汚染されていると感じました。魚はまだ浅瀬に見られますがすぐにでも対策を取らないと美しい海と生態系は守られないと思います。

reviews.title: Great service and people
reviews.text:
I am really satisfied with the experience in JW Marriot. The staffs were friendly, professional and good at heart. I love the interior design there, sophisticated and perfect in every photograph. 

In our private room: The toilet had 2 opposite mirrors that made me very impressed. The balkon with sea view was a great place for us to chitchat and watch sunrise. Besides, they prepared for us an anniversary cake. It looked not so good but its taste was great.

Btw seafood pizza was delicious, with fresh squid, tomato sauce and reasonable price (I also used my Marriot member card that time)

The sand in Bai Khem had beautiful color but it was not so soft for me. The water was not crystal clear as we went to some satellite islands near Phu Quoc island.

At checkout, they were considerate of the wedding noise and gave us a tote bag as a gift. 
We made many wonderful memories. Thank you very much.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for such a heartfelt message, it truly means a lot to us.

We’re so glad the concept and story of the resort resonated with you, and that even a short stay left you wishing for more. That sense of discovery is something we always hope our guests will experience. It’s also wonderful to hear that you enjoyed capturing moments around the property and felt well taken care of by our team.

We truly appreciate your understanding regarding the wedding on the day of your stay, and we’re happy to know it became part of your experience in a positive way. Most of all, we’re glad you left with beautiful memories, that is what matters most to us.

We would love to welcome you back again, hopefully for a longer stay next time.

Sincerely,

Duc Tran
Director of Rooms
JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa

reviews.title: 푸꾸옥 남부 최고의 리조트
reviews.positives:
jw푸꾸옥 보다 좋은 호텔, 더 고급호텔은 많을겁니다만

이보다 더 독특한 개성을 지닌 호텔은 단언컨데 없을겁니다

대학교 컨셉으로 만들어진 독특한 컨셉이 
평생에 한번쯤은 꼭 여기들려야할 매력적인 경험으로 다가올겁니다

밥이 참 맛있다는 강점도 존재합니다
왠만해선 맛있다는 소리 잘 안하는데 
여기 호텔은 참 맛있습니다 (특히 저녁)

화학실 컨셉의 칵테일 바도 정말 매력적인데
특이하게도 이용객은 참 드물더군요
흔들 그네에 바다를 바라보며 듣는 라이브
(단점이라면? 특산품인 다크럼 베이스의 칵테일로만 채워졌다는 점)

에메랄드 비치의 아름다움은 예상 밖이었고
남부에서는 여기가 단연 최고가 아닐까 싶습니다

매니저들의 서비스도 정말 인상깊었습니다
다들 하나같이 친절했고 좋은 경험이었지만
jayden , charlie , helen 3분께 특히 감사의 말씀을 올립니다

전반적으로 참 좋은 경험이었습니다
베트남에서 제가 묵어봤던 곳 중에서는 단연 최고인것 같고

다낭에 인터컨은 아직 기회가 안닿아서
베트남에서 최고인지 까진 나중에 알게될거 같습니다
reviews.negatives:
글쎄요 단점이라면 비싸요.. 크크크크크
이돈을 주고 가야 하나에서는 솔직히 좀 아리송합니다

사실 푸꿕 자체가 
전반적으로 베트남 치고는 상상을 초월하는 물가입니다
한국이랑 비교하면 싼건 사실인데.. 어.. 택시비에 마사지에.. 베트남 치고는 살인적인 물가입니다 진짜로

이걸 뭐라고 해야하나..
남부는 여기랑 힐튼 빼면 볼게 없어요
사실상 호캉스가 목적인데

한마디로 리조트가 가진 문제라기보단 
동네 자체가 관광지로서 매력이나 가성비는 떨어진다는 문제인데

파인다이닝 + 호캉스가 목적이라면 
여기 호텔은 흠잡을데 없는 선택일겁니다

핑크펄은 못가본게 너무 아쉽지만 
다른 식당서의 디너 경험으로 볼때 여기 맛집입니다

건너편의 불꽃놀이로 유명한 
모 호텔은 밥이 맛이 없습니다..

We’re truly honoured to have been part of your honeymoon, and it means so much to know that everything, from the atmosphere to the service and little details, helped make your stay memorable.

It’s especially lovely to hear that you felt the sense of calm and romance throughout your time here, exactly what a honeymoon should be.

We wish you both a lifetime of happiness together, and we would be delighted to welcome you back again for many more special occasions to come.

Sincerely,

reviews.title: I'm leaving while doing very well.ㅜㅜ
reviews.text: The check-in was very crowded and the waiting time was too long... Especially when they said they would let us know when everything was ready. I waited, but it became unbearable, so I went to the reception, and they told me that I could check in at 3 PM, but since I didn't come, my check-in didn't happen. There were too many guests, so the staff said it was hard to find help and that we needed to come according to the check-in time.... Other than that, everything was really great! The staff was friendly, breakfast was decent, and all the facilities were good! The weather was nice, so I was able to kayak and paddle at the beach! There was a Korean staff member, so I was able to have various conversations and received a lot of help, for which I’m very thankful!! I totally recommend it!!
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for sharing your experience with us, it really means a lot, especially knowing you had such a great overall stay.

We’re truly glad you were able to enjoy so many parts of the resort, from the beach activities to the facilities, and that our team, including our Korean-speaking associate, could support you during your visit. It sounds like you made the most of the beautiful weather as well.

At the same time, we’re genuinely sorry for the confusion and wait you experienced during check-in. This is certainly not the first impression we want to create, and your feedback has been shared with the team to improve both communication and coordination during busy periods.

Thank you again for your honest and kind words. We truly hope to welcome you back again for an even smoother experience next time.

Sincerely,

Duc Tran
Director of Rooms
JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa

reviews.title: Hơn cả mong đợi
reviews.text: Cảm ơn các bạn rất nhiều vì đã chào đón gia đình tôi và tạo chúng tôi một chuyến đi vô cùng hài lòng. Kiến trúc của resort không có gì để chê, sự kết hợp giữa màu sắc vui vẻ sặc sỡ và những đường nét mềm mại, vô cùng tuyệt vời, nc biển sạch trong, mỗi tội hướng này ko ngắm dc hoàng hôn. Buffet sáng cũng rất ngon và đa dạng. Các bạn nhân sự rất Thân thiện vui vẻ, đặc biệt là chúng tôi quý em Bắp hỗ trợ ở bể bơi và em Rafael hỗ trợ tại nhà hàng ăn sáng, em Sang CSKH .  Cảm ơn các em rất nhiều!
reviews.response:
Chị Lan thân mến,

JW Marriott Phú Quốc vô cùng hạnh phúc khi nhận được những lời khen chân thành từ gia đình mình. Thật tuyệt vời khi biết rằng gia đình đã có một chuyến đi hài lòng và đáng nhớ tại khu nghỉ dưỡng.

Đặc biệt, chúng tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn sâu sắc đến gia đình đã dành những lời động viên cho các bạn nhân viên, đặc biệt là em Bắp tại hồ bơi, em Rafael tại nhà hàng ăn sáng và em Sang ở bộ phận Chăm sóc Khách hàng. Sự hài lòng của gia đình là động lực to lớn để chúng tôi tiếp tục nỗ lực và mang đến những trải nghiệm tốt nhất cho khách hàng.

Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp gia đình trở lại khu nghỉ dưỡng trong tương lai để tiếp tục mang đến những kỷ niệm đẹp và đáng nhớ.

Trân trọng,

Mahajan Ian
Giám đốc Khối Vận hành
JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa

reviews.title: Лучшее соотношение цена-качество на моей памяти
reviews.positives:
Мне кажется, номинацию «лучшее соотношение качества и цены» забирает этот отель. Он находится в прекрасном уединенном месте. Территория, стилизованная под старинный кампус, красивая и ухоженная. В номере отдыхаешь с первой и до последней минуты: всё продумано до мелочей. Еще принесли welcome-подарок — местный мед. 

На территории 3 бассейна, стойки с полотенцами и водой — это очень заботливо. Пляж оцениваю на 7/10, т.к. грязновато, довольно много мусора в море и на берегу. Понимаю, что это не столько недосмотр персонала, сколько экологическая проблема острова, но тем не менее. 

Прекрасный завтрак: огромный выбор, много фруктов, хороший кофе. 

Персонал дружелюбный и внимательный. Хочу отметить, что их знание английского на порядок выше местных, с которыми я общалась до этого, в том числе в предыдущем отеле.
reviews.negatives:
Про пляж уже упомянула. 

Пара мелочей для объективности и баланса :)
– была заминка с чайником: вилка не вставлялась в розетку, я позвонила на ресепшен, и вместо того чтобы сразу прислать инженера, мы еще долго выясняли обстоятельства. 
– на второй день пребывания за завтраком был целый кофейный квест и с третьей попытки мне так и не сделали iced latte, пришлось пить теплый кофе.
– при чекауте у меня оставался баланс на депозите, о чем парень с ресепшена лично сообщил ресторану, где я обедала в ожидании такси. Когда попросила счет, они на полчаса (!) ушли выяснять мой баланс — это подпортило впечатление.

reviews.title: If you want to enjoy the beaches of Phu Quoc and Instagram spots, come here.
reviews.text:
I went with my wife and our nearly two-year-old baby. 

We also visited Regent right after. 

Both hotels have their clear pros and cons. 

First, some standout features: 

Photo spot - it’s such a visually striking hotel that no matter where you take a picture, even if you’re not good at photography, it turns out beautifully. 

Secondly, the service and friendliness are excellent. 

The quality of the food is quite high. 

A personal tip or opinion is that Redrum seems to be more heavily promoted, but it has a seafood café/restaurant vibe near the beach. 

While Pink Pearl might feel pricier, I thought its quality-to-price ratio was the best. 

The food quality is high, and there’s nothing lacking in the interior atmosphere and friendliness. 

The performance starts at 7 PM, and it seems to go for about 40 minutes with a 20-minute break. 

It's a collaboration of a violinist and a pianist, and they play very familiar and atmospheric music. 

There are plenty of pools where you can swim leisurely. 

The sea at Regent has very high waves and isn’t suitable for swimming, but here the water is shallow and calm, making it ideal for enjoying the ocean. 

It’s great to go out on a surfboard. 

The waves are small enough that you can even take a child under two on the surfboard with you. 

I think it’s one of the must-visit accommodations when traveling to Phu Quoc.

We are also glad you enjoyed the quality of food at both Redrum and Pink Pearl. We will certainly share your feedback with our teams. 

Thank you again for choosing JW Marriott Phu Quoc for your recent vacation. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future.

Warm regards,

Mahajan Ian
Director of Operations
JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa

reviews.title: This is the best accommodation in Phu Quoc, Vietnam!!
reviews.text: It's like a fairytale place. At first, I saw it in a YouTube review and thought I must visit because of the artwork-like visuals, but initially, I intended to stay at a special rate InterContinental. Then I quickly changed my mind, thinking I wanted to spend a little more and go to a really nice place, which turned out to be an excellent choice. The sea is truly fantastic, the pool is luxurious, and since it's March, it's quite peaceful, making it great to enjoy the resort. Compared to other beaches in Vietnam, the color of the sea is exactly what I used to see in movies, and just by looking at the atmosphere with western guests, it feels like a really nice resort. I highly recommend it. If you plan to go to a spa, search for Ang Spa. Initially, I visited a different place twice, but the hygiene and neighborhood atmosphere here are exceptionally good. And don’t expect much from the night market. Especially, the cheese they serve is almost like nacho cheese sauce, so don't order anything with cheese. I saw many cockroaches and rats at the night market, haha. It's not cheap, and there’s a lot of aggressive selling, so don’t have high expectations. Try to find a good restaurant near Ang Spa.

reviews.title: Эстетичный быт
reviews.positives:
Осознанное мировосприятие для меня - это про отель JWM на Phu Quoc. 

Дизайн и убранства отеля и номеров творит чудеса с мировосприятием человека, излечивает душевные раны от визуальных катаклизмов вседозволенности шаблонных образов и привносит нотки покоя в хаотическое сплетение разнообразных звуков бытия. 

Низкий поклон всем творцам, создающим подобные творения, всем меценатам, вкладывающим в искусство быта и всем заботливым менеджерам, чей бдительный взор охраняет эту красоту. 

Благодарю за возможность жить в красоте.
reviews.negatives: Гамбургер из морепродуктов. Я бы переосмыслила вкус и дизайн блюда.

reviews.positives:
Piękny hotel. Najładniejszy w jakim byłam. Fantastyczne jedzenie, świetne śniadania, dostępna nawet matcha co się nie zdarza. Wyciskane soki, wypiekane desery, super pieczywo, pełen wybór owoców, każda kawa. Pokoje duże, przestrzenne, kolonialny styl. Plaża zadbana, czysta. Baseny czyste, zadbane; dostępne leżaki, wygodne. Pokoje sprzątane 2x dziennie. Mieliśmy p9koj z ogródkiem, proste dojście na basen i plaże. Idealne na relaks z książką.

Bardzo duże gratulacje dla szefa kuchni.
reviews.negatives: Niestety przywitała nas Pani, która się uczyła. Zapomniała nawet o welcome drink, nie umiała odpowiedzieć na żadne pytanie, nic nie wiedziała i wydłużyła nasze zameldowanie do ponad godziny. Tak niewyszlolone osoby nie powinny być dedykowane gościom. Byliśmy ponad 30h w podróży i zależało nam na szybkim check-in. Dodatkowo język angielski tej Pani był bardzo mało zrozumiały. Fatalne pierwsze wrażenie. Odjęła swoim brakiem kompetencji całe dobre wrażenie, zabrała nam spokój i oczekiwany oddech. Wprowadziła tyle zamieszania, że bardzo utrudniła nam pierwsze chwile w hotelu, które już powinny być relaksem a nie stresem i problemami.

reviews.positives: The beach was emerald and beautiful
reviews.negatives:
I was disappointed with my recent experience. The staff were not welcoming and seemed overly focused on pushing a voucher for food and spa services costing up to 20 million dong. I explained that we were planning to explore the area during our two-night stay, and with breakfast already included, we simply wouldn’t have the time to use all the services offered. Despite this, they continued to insist, which felt intrusive.

Additionally, the hotel refers to itself as a “university,” which is confusing and adds unnecessary complexity. The program is difficult to read and navigate, making it frustrating to find relevant information. Instead of enhancing the experience, it made our stay unnecessarily stressful.

While the buildings look impressive in photos, the design is not practical. Carrying luggage and walking extra distances to reach the room was inconvenient and further detracted from the overall experience.

reviews.title: An Exceptional Stay in Phu Quoc — One of the Finest Hospitality Experiences From Our Travels Across 50+ Countries
reviews.text:
After travelling to more than 50 countries around the world, it becomes increasingly rare to be truly surprised by a hotel experience — but this stay in Phu Quoc was genuinely exceptional.

From the quality of the facilities to the warmth, professionalism, and attention to detail of the staff, everything exceeded expectations. The kindness and genuine hospitality of everyone we met made this experience truly unforgettable.

The breakfast experience every morning was magnificent — incredibly varied, high quality, and delivered with outstanding service and friendliness.

A very special thank you to the wonderful team at Tempus Fugit:
Richard, Tien, Robin, and all the staff members for creating such a welcoming and memorable atmosphere.

Heartfelt thanks as well to the fantastic team at Red Rum:
My and the entire staff for the excellent food, service, and atmosphere throughout our stay.

We would also like to give special recognition to the room service team attending room 3508. Their care, attention, and kindness were exceptional, and room 3508 will remain in our memories for a very long time.

A sincere thank you as well to Kevin, who was incredibly helpful with our luggage and transfers throughout the stay.

Special appreciation also goes to Thin, whose dedication and attention to detail could be seen every day while perfectly arranging the beach loungers with remarkable care and pride.

We are equally grateful to the reception and concierge teams for their professionalism and constant willingness to help, as well as to the wonderful cart drivers who transported us around the resort with kindness and smiles every day.

Without question, this was one of the most memorable hospitality experiences we have had anywhere in the world. Highly recommended, and we will definitely return.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing such a generous and heartfelt review.

reviews.title: An Exceptional Stay in Phu Quoc — One of the Finest Hospitality Experiences From Our Travels Across 50+ Countries
reviews.text:
After travelling to more than 50 countries around the world, it becomes increasingly rare to be truly surprised by a hotel experience — but this stay in Phu Quoc was genuinely exceptional.

From the quality of the facilities to the warmth, professionalism, and attention to detail of the staff, everything exceeded expectations. The kindness and genuine hospitality of everyone we met made this experience truly unforgettable.

The breakfast experience every morning was magnificent — incredibly varied, high quality, and delivered with outstanding service and friendliness.

A very special thank you to the wonderful team at Tempus Fugit:
Richard, Tien, Robin, and all the staff members for creating such a welcoming and memorable atmosphere.

Heartfelt thanks as well to the fantastic team at Red Rum:
My and the entire staff for the excellent food, service, and atmosphere throughout our stay.

We would also like to give special recognition to the room service team attending room 3508. Their care, attention, and kindness were exceptional, and room 3508 will remain in our memories for a very long time.

A sincere thank you as well to Kevin, who was incredibly helpful with our luggage and transfers throughout the stay.

Special appreciation also goes to Thin, whose dedication and attention to detail could be seen every day while perfectly arranging the beach loungers with remarkable care and pride.

We are equally grateful to the reception and concierge teams for their professionalism and constant willingness to help, as well as to the wonderful cart drivers who transported us around the resort with kindness and smiles every day.

Without question, this was one of the most memorable hospitality experiences we have had anywhere in the world. Highly recommended, and we will definitely return.

The rooms are very spacious with huge bathrooms too. Housekeeping comes 3 times a day. The spa is heavenly (ask for Hai) and feels very luxurious too. Great activities for both kids and adults - mostly free with a few that you pay for
reviews.negatives: They have some packages and if you take them, you forfeit any Marriott membership discounts but gain the “credit” discount. In the end, it was worth taking the credit for two or more people but I think the staff should explain this part as it caused confusion.  In fact your type of membership benefits also needs to be explained as that can vary too.  Do your maths 😄

reviews.title: 設備、従業員、朝食、ロケーション全て満点
reviews.text:
一階のオーシャンフロントに宿泊しました。全面ガラス張りで、すぐそこの砂浜と海がよく見えるロケーションでした。

ベランダを出るとそこはプールサイドで砂浜へのアクセスも数歩という絶好の部屋でした。

部屋のサイズも程よく、大型の風呂桶とシャワールーム、二つの洗面所がカップル使用には便利でした。

朝食のバッフェは種類が豊富でレストランも広く、各国の料理が揃っていました。

六月中の雨季一歩手前でしたが、二泊三日の滞在は天気に恵まれ、白い砂浜とエメラルドグリーンの海を堪能できました。ケムビーチは遠浅で殆ど波もありません。それとは反対に先日宿泊した西海岸側は波も荒く強風が吹いていました。また、平日という事もあり、ビーチには多くても10組のカップル以下の利用で、まさしくプライベートビーチでした。

それとホテル主催のサイクリングやボート等の無料貸し出しもあってサービスも良かったです。従業員の笑顔や挨拶も良く気持ち良いホテルでした。

敷地は広大です。電話で呼ぶと直ぐにスタッフが電動カートで来てくれるので移動も楽です。

ほぼ満点と言えますが、唯一ベットの掛け布団が厚いので夜は暑苦しかったです。エアコンは効くので下げればいいのでしょうが。

再度フーコック島へ行くのであれば、再度使いたいホテルです。

最後にナイトマーケットはタクシーで35万VND25分です。

reviews.title: Very beautiful hotel with enormous prices
reviews.positives:
Amazing hotel buildings, architecture and territory. The best we have ever seen. Each millimeter has its own decorations. 
Very good breakfast
Beautiful beach area. Nice sand. Water itself is blue and clean (except plastic garbage - see below)
Nice rooms
Nice location
reviews.negatives:
No gluten free support. Very inaccurate. Every time we needed to remind. No gluten free food on breakfast. Only by request. Staff is proposing gluten meals and sometimes even doesn’t know what is it. It was very dangerous. 
Very bad beach area cleaning. Full of garbage every hour. Only one cleaning lady from service company. hotel
Doesn’t have own cleaning staff. The water area is being cleaned with net only by request. A lot of Garbage coming from the sea every minute: bottles, shoes, plastic etc
Sun is covering beach area only until 3:30 pm. 
VERY EXPENSIVE Restaurants. Price is enormous. 5-6 times more expensive then in Vietnam. And a la cart restaurants are not so tasty: Beer which cost 10k here is 110k. Fish for 1mln is very poor. Just fish and spicy sauce. 
Most of the staff don’t speak English. Hard to explain anything.

reviews.title: Amazing resort at a great beach
reviews.positives:
It was a great stay and the highlight of our trip to Vietnam. The resort is located on a great beach where you can just roll down from your room to enjoy. 
The rooms are spacious, the beds are comfy, the bathroom is big and there unlimited drinking water provided for free anywhere in the resort which was highly appreciated.
The beach is amazing, there are many different pools to choose from, the sunbeds are great, there were free to use kayaks and paddle boards and many toys for the sand for the little ones.
The kid center is cool, our child enjoyed it and he was surrounded with attention from the ladies working there.
The breakfast was also great.
reviews.negatives:
Very few things I didn't like. One is that the hotel could work on the rooms cleanness. Generally it was fine but when looking into details you could see many areas for improvement especially in the shower area and curtains.
The other one is that there were not many vegan options for dinner available for a high end resort like this but we found other options in proximity of the resort. I am confident that the staff would have arranged something but there was a misunderstanding between vegan and vegetarian.
BUT we would definitely come back and hopefully the see the improvement ;)

reviews.text: フライトの時間の都合でチェックイン時間よりも早く着いてしまったのですが、部屋が空いていたので融通を利かせてアーリーチェックインを手配してくれました。建物は昔の大学を改装したとのことで、新しくはないのですが良く手入れされています。空港の西側の海岸エリアはホテルや店が多数立ち並び、大変な賑わいですが、このホテルのある島南端のエリアは店はほとんどありません。ホテル内でゆったり過ごすことをお勧めします。遠浅のプライベートビーチは静かで非常にきれいです。プールもきれいですし、ジムの設備も充実していました。朝の朝食ビュッフェは驚くほどの種類があります。ただ、高級ホテルですので食事、SPAなどはそれなりのお値段がします。チェックアウト日に、これまたフライトの都合で少し時間があったのですが、レートチェックアウトを無料で手配してくれるなど、本当に親身にサービスをしてくれました。スタッフが良く教育されており、非常に気持ちが良かったです。今回は1人旅でしたが、カップルや家族連れでゆっくり滞在するにはとても良いホテルと思います。

reviews.title: PERFECT
reviews.positives:
I had very high expectations for this hotel, and it completely exceeded them. It’s impressive. huge, with a very unique design inspired by an old university, and highly interactive

The staff is attentive to every detail. They provided fresh filtered water every day and even offered relaxing sleep playlists, checking if the pillow was comfortable for you.

The room was beautiful, very spacious, with a large balcony overlooking the beach.

As for the beach, it really was amazing. I had read that it would inevitably be dirty, but honestly I didn’t see a single piece of trash. There were always people cleaning. The beach was practically empty, so it was very quiet and peaceful.

The food was excellent, and the breakfast was very abundant. I wish I could have tried everything.

また行きたい気持ちにさせてくれます。

reviews.title: Paradise in Phu Quoc
reviews.positives: Everything was fantastic. We were 2 adults ans a 6yo and  we were very well received. The staff is amazing, que facilities are perfect, the games and decorations and kids club were flawless. The room was beautiful, very clean. Everything plenty. And the best part, the beach!! Pictures perfect, water at 30°C, clean sand, empty beach, water toys to play, good beach bar service. Superb.
reviews.negatives: More directions scatered in the resort to facilitate mobility.

reviews.title: Colourful resort with private beach and pools
reviews.text: A colourful and aesthetic resort designed by Bills Barnsley. It used to be a university so they have kept a lot of its essence from the past. Everywhere is picture-worthy though the resort is rather old comparatively. The gym is very impressively well equipped with everything you can think of. There are three swimming pools with jacuzzi in some of them and a private beach. However, the activities available within the resort are limited. It would be great if there are more. There are shuttle bus 5 minutes walk from the hotel which goes to sunset town for free. And there are many restaurants and massages shops outside the university but mostly touristic ones.
reviews.response:
Dear Hoi,

Thank you for taking the time to provide us with your valuable insights about your recent stay experience.

We are delighted that you loved the resort's unique aesthetic, a testament to the vision of renowned architect, Bill Bensley. We are particularly pleased that you enjoyed the gym well-equipped, swimming pools, including those with Jacuzzis, and private beach.

We understand your point about the limited on-site activities and will certainly consider expanding our offerings to enhance the guest experience.

We are pleased that you found Sunset Town convenient for exploring. You'll find a variety of dining options there, from local Vietnamese cuisine to international flavors, offering a taste of both local and international experiences.

We look forward to welcoming you back to JW Marriott Phu Quoc in the future for next stay.

Best regards,

Mahajan Ian
Director of Operations
JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa

reviews.title: holiday of a lifetime - don't miss out
reviews.positives:
Very suitable and enjoyable for all ages and all sizes, from couple to large family.
Location = 10/10, very beautiful location on a beach. 
Rooms = 10/10, spacious luxurious large, all designed for family i believe so very big for just a couple. 
Staff = 10/10, check in was easy, we arrived early and went for a walk along the beach and they messaged on whatsapp when room was available. Offer buggy/carts to drive around. 
Restraunts/food = 2000/10, 
Breakfast buffet was one of the nicest i've ever had. So many stations and cooked-to-order dishes. We ate lunch at Tempus Fugit and ordered arguably the nicest (but most expensive) pho I've ever had in my life. 
Red Rum - 10/10 - very nice open beach restaurant. staff again were amazing, cook accommodating to slight menu variations.
Pink Pearl = 1,000,000/10  - The best dinner experience i've ever had in my life. Expensive but totally worth it.
If we would visit Vietnam again, it would be purely to stay at this hotel. 
Note: this holiday location is very weather dependant - we had the nicest, loveliest weather imaginable - No rain and only 22-27C or 71-80F.
reviews.negatives:
Bit expensive but worth the money. 
This holiday location is very weather dependent - we had the nicest, loveliest weather imaginable - No rain and only 22-27C or 71-80F.
